name: trail-blazer-flow
description: Drive GitHub issues through planner → implementer → verifier subagents, locally on a Claude Code subscription. Steady-state cycle skill (issue-cycle), persistent verification baseline, policy-gated plan auto-approval, bounded CI auto-fix, crash recovery, greenfield kickoff (project-kickoff), worktree-parallel implementation, label lifecycle, repo onboarding (harness-setup), human-gated merges always.
